title: CVE-2026-3946 - PHPEMS index.php cross site scripting

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CVE-2026-3946 - PHPEMS index.php cross site scripting
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/18
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*index.php*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
